findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Archive entry name usage in file operations
 * @description Find all places where archive entry names are used in file/path construction
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/archive-entry-name-file-ops
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc, ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr
where
  // Any getName() call on archive-related types
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.commons.compress.archivers", "ArchiveEntry") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.util.zip", "ZipEntry") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Entry%") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Resource%")
  ) and
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  // They're in the same method
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable()
select mc, "Archive entry getName() used in same method as File construction - potential Zip Slip"
findings.hypothesis: Archive entry names used in the same methods as File construction

message.text: Archive entry getName() used in same method as File construction - potential Zip Slip
Archive entry getName() used in same method as File construction - potential Zip Slip

findings.hypothesis: Archive entry getName() taint-flows to File constructor in extraction methods

message.text:
Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](1) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.
Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](2) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.

Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](1) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.
Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](2) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.

Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](1) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.
Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](2) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.

Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](1) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.
Zip Slip: archive entry name [entry.getName()](2) flows to File constructor without path traversal check.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name TarUnArchiver path traversal - entry name to File
 * @description Look at how TarUnArchiver constructs destination files from entry names
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/tar-unarchiver-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all calls to getName() on TarArchiveEntry within the tar unarchiver
from MethodCall getName, Method enclosingMethod
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  enclosingMethod = getName.getEnclosingCallable() and
  (
    enclosingMethod.getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%TarUnArchiver%") or
    enclosingMethod.getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%AbstractUnArchiver%")
  )
select getName, "getName() call in " + enclosingMethod.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + enclosingMethod.getName() + " at line " + getName.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: TarUnArchiver uses getName() from archive entries that may lead to path traversal

message.text: getName() call in AbstractUnArchiver.isSelected at line 252
getName() call in TarUnArchiver.execute at line 110
getName() call in TarUnArchiver.execute at line 113

findings.hypothesis: TarUnArchiver.execute() uses getName() from TarArchiveEntry and passes it unsanitized to file operations

message.text: Tar Zip Slip: entry getName() [entry name](1) flows unsanitized to file operation.

findings.hypothesis: AbstractZipUnArchiver uses getName() from ZipEntry and passes it unsanitized to file operations

message.text:
Zip Slip in ZipUnArchiver: entry getName() [entry name](1) flows to file operation.
Zip Slip in ZipUnArchiver: entry getName() [entry name](2) flows to file operation.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractZipUnArchiver path validation check
 * @description Check what validation exists in AbstractZipUnArchiver around entry name usage
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/abstractzipunarchiver-path-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Callable c, MethodCall mc
where
  c.getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%AbstractZipUnArchiver%") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = c and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getName") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("extractFile") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("indexOf") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getAbsolutePath")
  )
select mc, "In AbstractZipUnArchiver." + c.getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.toString()
findings.hypothesis: Checking path validation in AbstractZipUnArchiver around entry name usage

message.text: In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 174: getName(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 178: getName(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 195: getAbsolutePath(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.extractFileIfIncluded at line 222: extractFile(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 241: getName(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 246: startsWith(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 246: getName(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 251: getName(...)
In AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 265: getAbsolutePath(...)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractUnArchiver extractFile implementation analysis
 * @description Find all File constructions and path operations in AbstractUnArchiver methods
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/abstractunarchiver-extractfile-impl
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all File constructor calls with their arguments in AbstractUnArchiver
from ClassInstanceExpr ce
where
  ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  ce.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%AbstractUnArchiver%")
select ce, "File construction in AbstractUnArchiver." + ce.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + 
  " at line " + ce.getLocation().getStartLine() + " with arg: " + ce.getArgument(0).toString()
findings.hypothesis: Inspect how File is constructed in AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile to understand the path traversal risk

message.text: File construction in AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile at line 327 with arg: symlinkDestination

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Zip Slip summary - all unarchiver classes missing path validation
 * @description Comprehensive check for archive entry names flowing to file operations without canonical path validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/zip-slip-summary
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find extractFile() calls and check if canonical path validation exists in the same method
from MethodCall extractFileCall
where
  extractFileCall.getMethod().hasName("extractFile") and
  extractFileCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.archiver", "AbstractUnArchiver") and
  // No getCanonicalPath() or getCanonicalFile() check before extractFile
  not exists(MethodCall canonical |
    (
      canonical.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
      canonical.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
      canonical.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")
    ) and
    canonical.getEnclosingCallable() = extractFileCall.getEnclosingCallable()
  )
select extractFileCall, "extractFile() called in " + 
  extractFileCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." +
  extractFileCall.getEnclosingCallable().getName() +
  " at line " + extractFileCall.getLocation().getStartLine() +
  " without getCanonicalPath() validation - Zip Slip vulnerability"
findings.hypothesis: extractFile() called without canonical path validation across all unarchiver types

message.text: extractFile() called in TarUnArchiver.execute at line 113 without getCanonicalPath() validation - Zip Slip vulnerability
extractFile() called in AbstractZipUnArchiver.extractFileIfIncluded at line 222 without getCanonicalPath() validation - Zip Slip vulnerability

findings.hypothesis: Archive entry names flowing to FileOutputStream/FileInputStream constructors without path traversal validation

message.text:
Archive entry name [entry name](1) flows to file stream constructor without path traversal validation.
Archive entry name [entry name](2) flows to file stream constructor without path traversal validation.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractUnArchiver extract method analysis
 * @description Examine the extract methods in AbstractUnArchiver for path traversal issues
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/unarchiver-extract-analysis
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find File constructor calls in unarchiver classes
from ClassInstanceExpr ce, RefType declaringType
where
  ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  ce.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = declaringType and
  (
    declaringType.getName().matches("%UnArchiver%") or
    declaringType.getName().matches("%Unarchiver%") or
    (declaringType.getName().matches("%Archiver%") and declaringType.getName().matches("%Abstract%"))
  )
select ce, "File construction in " + declaringType.getName() + "." + ce.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + ": " + ce.toString()
findings.hypothesis: File construction in UnArchiver classes that may use archive entry names

message.text: File construction in AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile: new File(...)
File construction in TarUnArchiver.execute: new File(...)
File construction in AbstractZipArchiver.addParentDirs: new File(...)
File construction in AbstractZipArchiver.addParentDirs: new File(...)

    mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or

    mc.getMethod().hasName("extractFile") or

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name startsWith path check without canonicalization in archive unpackers
 * @description Path containment using startsWith() without prior getCanonicalPath() - bypassable
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/startswith-no-canonical-unarchiver
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall startsWithCall
where
  startsWithCall.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
  (
    startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%UnArchiver%") or
    startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Unarchiver%")
  ) and
  not exists(MethodCall canonical |
    (canonical.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or canonical.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile")) and
    canonical.getEnclosingCallable() = startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable()
  )
select startsWithCall, "startsWith() path check in " + 
  startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." +
  startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + 
  startsWithCall.getLocation().getStartLine() +
  " - no getCanonicalPath() found in the same method, path traversal bypass possible"
findings.hypothesis: startsWith() path containment check without getCanonicalPath() in unarchiver - bypassable with ../ sequences

message.text: startsWith() path check in AbstractZipUnArchiver.execute at line 246 - no getCanonicalPath() found in the same method, path traversal bypass possible

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Absolute path in archive entry - path traversal via absolute path injection
 * @description Archive entries with absolute paths can escape target directory
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/absolute-path-archive-entry
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-036
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Check if there's any validation for absolute paths from archive entries
// before they are used to construct File objects
from MethodCall getName, ClassInstanceExpr fileExpr
where
  getName.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
  (
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Entry%") or
    getName.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Resource%")
  ) and
  fileExpr.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  getName.getEnclosingCallable() = fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable() and
  // No check for absolute path (startsWith("/") or isAbsolute()) before file creation
  not exists(MethodCall check |
    (
      check.getMethod().hasName("isAbsolute") or
      check.getMethod().hasName("startsWith")
    ) and
    check.getEnclosingCallable() = getName.getEnclosingCallable() and
    check.getLocation().getStartLine() <= fileExpr.getLocation().getStartLine()
  )
select fileExpr, "File constructed from archive entry name in " + 
  fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." +
  fileExpr.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + 
  " with no absolute path or traversal check before construction"
findings.hypothesis: Archive entries with absolute paths can escape target directory - no isAbsolute() check present

message.text: File constructed from archive entry name in DirectoryArchiver.execute with no absolute path or traversal check before construction
File constructed from archive entry name in DirectoryArchiver.execute with no absolute path or traversal check before construction
File constructed from archive entry name in JarArchiver.grabFilesAndDirs with no absolute path or traversal check before construction

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Symlink destination path traversal in AbstractUnArchiver
 * @description Symlink destination from archive entry flows to File constructor without validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/symlink-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking

// Look for symlink-related methods in AbstractUnArchiver and subclasses
from MethodCall mc, Callable enclosing
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing and
  (
    enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%UnArchiver%") or
    enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Unarchiver%")
  ) and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getSymlinkDestination") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getLinkName") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isSymbolicLink") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("createSymbolicLink") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getSymlink")
  )
select mc, "Symlink operation in " + enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + enclosing.getName() + 
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.toString()
findings.hypothesis: Symlink handling in unarchiver classes may allow path traversal via symlink targets

message.text: Symlink operation in AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile at line 327: createSymbolicLink(...)
Symlink operation in TarUnArchiver.execute at line 112: isSymbolicLink(...)
Symlink operation in TarUnArchiver.execute at line 112: getLinkName(...)
